title: Career Opportunity Teacher at BSC Academy

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at BSC Academy
jsonLd.description:
BSC Academy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BSC Academy:
BSC Academy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSC Academy!
